Command started: cat > /tmp/bin_recv.sh <<'__HEREDOC_EOF__'
#!/bin/sh
# bin_recv.sh — Receive binary file over serial using hex-framed protocol.
#
# Protocol (async — sender doesn't wait for ACK before sending next):
#   F:<offset>:<hex_chunk>:<crc32>\n  — data frame at byte offset
#   ACK:<offset>\n                    — chunk at <offset> received OK
#   NACK:<expected_offset>\n          — missing/bad chunk, resend from here
#   EOF:<total_size>:<total_crc32>\n  — transfer complete
#   DONE:<crc32>\n                    — file verified
#   FAIL:<reason>\n                   — verification failed
#   C:STOP\n                          — abort
#
# The receiver ignores frames with offset != expected_offset and NACKs.
# The sender streams frames ahead and rewinds on NACK.
#
# Usage: bin_recv.sh <output_path>

OUTPUT="$1"

if [ -z "$OUTPUT" ]; then
    echo "Usage: $0 <output_path>" >&2
    exit 1
fi

# Hex decode and CRC functions
if command -v xxd >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    _hex_decode() { xxd -r -p; }
else
    _hex_decode() { sed 's/../\\x&/g' | xargs printf 2>/dev/null; }
fi

if command -v crc32 >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    _crc32() { crc32 /dev/stdin 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $1}'; }
elif command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    _crc32() { python3 -c "import sys,zlib; d=sys.stdin.buffer.read(); print(format(zlib.crc32(d)&0xFFFFFFFF,'08x'))"; }
else
    _crc32() { cat >/dev/null; echo "00000000"; }
fi

EXPECTED_OFFSET=0
TMPFILE="${OUTPUT}.recv"

rm -f "$TMPFILE"
touch "$TMPFILE"

# Disable echo on the serial console to avoid doubling traffic.
# The sender's frames would otherwise be echoed back, wasting bandwidth.
# We restore echo on exit.
TTY_DEV=$(tty 2>/dev/null)
if [ -n "$TTY_DEV" ] && [ "$TTY_DEV" != "not a tty" ]; then
    stty -echo 2>/dev/null
    trap 'stty echo 2>/dev/null' EXIT
fi

echo "READY"

while IFS= read -r LINE; do
    LINE=$(echo "$LINE" | tr -d '\r')

    case "$LINE" in
        F:*)
            # Data frame: F:<offset>:<hex_data>:<crc32>
            FRAME_OFFSET=$(echo "$LINE" | cut -d: -f2)
            DATA=$(echo "$LINE" | cut -d: -f3)
            RECV_CRC=$(echo "$LINE" | cut -d: -f4)

            if [ -z "$FRAME_OFFSET" ] || [ -z "$DATA" ] || [ -z "$RECV_CRC" ]; then
                echo "NACK:${EXPECTED_OFFSET}"
                continue
            fi

            # Wrong offset — NACK with what we need
            if [ "$FRAME_OFFSET" != "$EXPECTED_OFFSET" ]; then
                echo "NACK:${EXPECTED_OFFSET}"
                continue
            fi

            # Verify CRC32
            CALC_CRC=$(echo -n "$DATA" | _hex_decode | _crc32)
            if [ "$CALC_CRC" != "$RECV_CRC" ]; then
                echo "NACK:${EXPECTED_OFFSET}"
                continue
            fi

            # Decode and append to file
            CHUNK_SIZE=$(echo -n "$DATA" | wc -c)
            CHUNK_SIZE=$((CHUNK_SIZE / 2))  # hex chars / 2 = bytes
            echo -n "$DATA" | _hex_decode >> "$TMPFILE"
            EXPECTED_OFFSET=$((EXPECTED_OFFSET + CHUNK_SIZE))
            echo "ACK:${EXPECTED_OFFSET}"
            ;;

        EOF:*)
            # EOF:<total_size>:<total_crc32>
            EXPECTED_SIZE=$(echo "$LINE" | cut -d: -f2)
            EXPECTED_CRC=$(echo "$LINE" | cut -d: -f3)

            mv "$TMPFILE" "$OUTPUT"

            ACTUAL_SIZE=$(wc -c < "$OUTPUT")
            ACTUAL_CRC=$(cat "$OUTPUT" | _crc32)

            if [ "$ACTUAL_SIZE" != "$EXPECTED_SIZE" ]; then
                echo "FAIL:size_mismatch:expected=${EXPECTED_SIZE}:actual=${ACTUAL_SIZE}"
                exit 1
            fi

            if [ -n "$EXPECTED_CRC" ] && [ "$EXPECTED_CRC" != "none" ]; then
                if [ "$ACTUAL_CRC" = "$EXPECTED_CRC" ]; then
                    echo "DONE:${ACTUAL_CRC}"
                else
                    echo "FAIL:crc_mismatch:expected=${EXPECTED_CRC}:actual=${ACTUAL_CRC}"
                    exit 1
                fi
            else
                echo "DONE:${ACTUAL_CRC}"
            fi
            exit 0
            ;;

        C:STOP*)
            rm -f "$TMPFILE"
            echo "STOPPED"
            exit 1
            ;;
    esac
done

__HEREDOC_EOF__

metadata.command:
cat > /tmp/bin_recv.sh <<'__HEREDOC_EOF__'
#!/bin/sh
# bin_recv.sh — Receive binary file over serial using hex-framed protocol.
#
# Protocol (async — sender doesn't wait for ACK before sending next):
#   F:<offset>:<hex_chunk>:<crc32>\n  — data frame at byte offset
#   ACK:<offset>\n                    — chunk at <offset> received OK
#   NACK:<expected_offset>\n          — missing/bad chunk, resend from here
#   EOF:<total_size>:<total_crc32>\n  — transfer complete
#   DONE:<crc32>\n                    — file verified
#   FAIL:<reason>\n                   — verification failed
#   C:STOP\n                          — abort
#
# The receiver ignores frames with offset != expected_offset and NACKs.
# The sender streams frames ahead and rewinds on NACK.
#
# Usage: bin_recv.sh <output_path>

OUTPUT="$1"

if [ -z "$OUTPUT" ]; then
    echo "Usage: $0 <output_path>" >&2
    exit 1
fi

# Hex decode and CRC functions
if command -v xxd >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    _hex_decode() { xxd -r -p; }
else
    _hex_decode() { sed 's/../\\x&/g' | xargs printf 2>/dev/null; }
fi

if command -v crc32 >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    _crc32() { crc32 /dev/stdin 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $1}'; }
elif command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    _crc32() { python3 -c "import sys,zlib; d=sys.stdin.buffer.read(); print(format(zlib.crc32(d)&0xFFFFFFFF,'08x'))"; }
else
    _crc32() { cat >/dev/null; echo "00000000"; }
fi

EXPECTED_OFFSET=0
TMPFILE="${OUTPUT}.recv"

rm -f "$TMPFILE"
touch "$TMPFILE"

# Disable echo on the serial console to avoid doubling traffic.
# The sender's frames would otherwise be echoed back, wasting bandwidth.
# We restore echo on exit.
TTY_DEV=$(tty 2>/dev/null)
if [ -n "$TTY_DEV" ] && [ "$TTY_DEV" != "not a tty" ]; then
    stty -echo 2>/dev/null
    trap 'stty echo 2>/dev/null' EXIT
fi

echo "READY"

while IFS= read -r LINE; do
    LINE=$(echo "$LINE" | tr -d '\r')

    case "$LINE" in
        F:*)
            # Data frame: F:<offset>:<hex_data>:<crc32>
            FRAME_OFFSET=$(echo "$LINE" | cut -d: -f2)
            DATA=$(echo "$LINE" | cut -d: -f3)
            RECV_CRC=$(echo "$LINE" | cut -d: -f4)

            if [ -z "$FRAME_OFFSET" ] || [ -z "$DATA" ] || [ -z "$RECV_CRC" ]; then
                echo "NACK:${EXPECTED_OFFSET}"
                continue
            fi

            # Wrong offset — NACK with what we need
            if [ "$FRAME_OFFSET" != "$EXPECTED_OFFSET" ]; then
                echo "NACK:${EXPECTED_OFFSET}"
                continue
            fi

            # Verify CRC32
            CALC_CRC=$(echo -n "$DATA" | _hex_decode | _crc32)
            if [ "$CALC_CRC" != "$RECV_CRC" ]; then
                echo "NACK:${EXPECTED_OFFSET}"
                continue
            fi

            # Decode and append to file
            CHUNK_SIZE=$(echo -n "$DATA" | wc -c)
            CHUNK_SIZE=$((CHUNK_SIZE / 2))  # hex chars / 2 = bytes
            echo -n "$DATA" | _hex_decode >> "$TMPFILE"
            EXPECTED_OFFSET=$((EXPECTED_OFFSET + CHUNK_SIZE))
            echo "ACK:${EXPECTED_OFFSET}"
            ;;

        EOF:*)
            # EOF:<total_size>:<total_crc32>
            EXPECTED_SIZE=$(echo "$LINE" | cut -d: -f2)
            EXPECTED_CRC=$(echo "$LINE" | cut -d: -f3)

            mv "$TMPFILE" "$OUTPUT"

            ACTUAL_SIZE=$(wc -c < "$OUTPUT")
            ACTUAL_CRC=$(cat "$OUTPUT" | _crc32)

            if [ "$ACTUAL_SIZE" != "$EXPECTED_SIZE" ]; then
                echo "FAIL:size_mismatch:expected=${EXPECTED_SIZE}:actual=${ACTUAL_SIZE}"
                exit 1
            fi

            if [ -n "$EXPECTED_CRC" ] && [ "$EXPECTED_CRC" != "none" ]; then
                if [ "$ACTUAL_CRC" = "$EXPECTED_CRC" ]; then
                    echo "DONE:${ACTUAL_CRC}"
                else
                    echo "FAIL:crc_mismatch:expected=${EXPECTED_CRC}:actual=${ACTUAL_CRC}"
                    exit 1
                fi
            else
                echo "DONE:${ACTUAL_CRC}"
            fi
            exit 0
            ;;

        C:STOP*)
            rm -f "$TMPFILE"
            echo "STOPPED"
            exit 1
            ;;
    esac
done

__HEREDOC_EOF__

#!/bin/sh
# bin_recv.sh — Receive binary file over serial using hex-framed protocol.
#
# Protocol (async — sender doesn't wait for ACK before sending next):
#   F:<offset>:<hex_chunk>:<crc32>\n  — data frame at byte offset
#   ACK:<offset>\n                    — chunk at <offset> received OK
#   NACK:<expected_offset>\n          — missing/bad chunk, resend from here
#   EOF:<total_size>:<total_crc32>\n  — transfer complete
#   DONE:<crc32>\n                    — file verified
#   FAIL:<reason>\n                   — verification failed
#   C:STOP\n                          — abort
#
# The receiver ignores frames with offset != expected_offset and NACKs.
# The sender streams frames ahead and rewinds on NACK.
#
# Usage: bin_recv.sh <output_path>

OUTPUT="$1"

if [ -z "$OUTPUT" ]; then
    echo "Usage: $0 <output_path>" >&2
    exit 1
fi

# Hex decode and CRC functions
if command -v xxd >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    _hex_decode() { xxd -r -p; }
else
    _hex_decode() { sed 's/../\\x&/g' | xargs printf 2>/dev/null; }
fi

if command -v crc32 >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    _crc32() { crc32 /dev/stdin 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $1}'; }
elif command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    _crc32() { python3 -c "import sys,zlib; d=sys.stdin.buffer.read(); print(format(zlib.crc32(d)&0xFFFFFFFF,'08x'))"; }
else
    _crc32() { cat >/dev/null; echo "00000000"; }
fi

EXPECTED_OFFSET=0
TMPFILE="${OUTPUT}.recv"

rm -f "$TMPFILE"
touch "$TMPFILE"

# Disable echo on the serial console to avoid doubling traffic.
# The sender's frames would otherwise be echoed back, wasting bandwidth.
# We restore echo on exit.
TTY_DEV=$(tty 2>/dev/null)
if [ -n "$TTY_DEV" ] && [ "$TTY_DEV" != "not a tty" ]; then
    stty -echo 2>/dev/null
    trap 'stty echo 2>/dev/null' EXIT
fi

echo "READY"

while IFS= read -r LINE; do
    LINE=$(echo "$LINE" | tr -d '\r')

    case "$LINE" in
        F:*)
            # Data frame: F:<offset>:<hex_data>:<crc32>
            FRAME_OFFSET=$(echo "$LINE" | cut -d: -f2)
            DATA=$(echo "$LINE" | cut -d: -f3)
            RECV_CRC=$(echo "$LINE" | cut -d: -f4)

            if [ -z "$FRAME_OFFSET" ] || [ -z "$DATA" ] || [ -z "$RECV_CRC" ]; then
                echo "NACK:${EXPECTED_OFFSET}"
                continue
            fi

            # Wrong offset — NACK with what we need
            if [ "$FRAME_OFFSET" != "$EXPECTED_OFFSET" ]; then
                echo "NACK:${EXPECTED_OFFSET}"
                continue
            fi

            # Verify CRC32
            CALC_CRC=$(echo -n "$DATA" | _hex_decode | _crc32)
            if [ "$CALC_CRC" != "$RECV_CRC" ]; then
                echo "NACK:${EXPECTED_OFFSET}"
                continue
            fi

            # Decode and append to file
            CHUNK_SIZE=$(echo -n "$DATA" | wc -c)
            CHUNK_SIZE=$((CHUNK_SIZE / 2))  # hex chars / 2 = bytes
            echo -n "$DATA" | _hex_decode >> "$TMPFILE"
            EXPECTED_OFFSET=$((EXPECTED_OFFSET + CHUNK_SIZE))
            echo "ACK:${EXPECTED_OFFSET}"
            ;;

        EOF:*)
            # EOF:<total_size>:<total_crc32>
            EXPECTED_SIZE=$(echo "$LINE" | cut -d: -f2)
            EXPECTED_CRC=$(echo "$LINE" | cut -d: -f3)

            mv "$TMPFILE" "$OUTPUT"

            ACTUAL_SIZE=$(wc -c < "$OUTPUT")
            ACTUAL_CRC=$(cat "$OUTPUT" | _crc32)

            if [ "$ACTUAL_SIZE" != "$EXPECTED_SIZE" ]; then
                echo "FAIL:size_mismatch:expected=${EXPECTED_SIZE}:actual=${ACTUAL_SIZE}"
                exit 1
            fi

            if [ -n "$EXPECTED_CRC" ] && [ "$EXPECTED_CRC" != "none" ]; then
                if [ "$ACTUAL_CRC" = "$EXPECTED_CRC" ]; then
                    echo "DONE:${ACTUAL_CRC}"
                else
                    echo "FAIL:crc_mismatch:expected=${EXPECTED_CRC}:actual=${ACTUAL_CRC}"
                    exit 1
                fi
            else
                echo "DONE:${ACTUAL_CRC}"
            fi
            exit 0
            ;;

        C:STOP*)
            rm -f "$TMPFILE"
            echo "STOPPED"
            exit 1
            ;;
    esac
done

data:
Command started: cat > /tmp/bin_send.sh <<'__HEREDOC_EOF__'
#!/bin/sh
# bin_send.sh — Send binary file over serial using hex-framed protocol.
#
# Async protocol — sends frames without waiting for ACK. On NACK,
# rewinds to the NACK'd offset and resends from there.
#
# Protocol:
#   F:<offset>:<hex_chunk>:<crc32>\n   — data frame at byte offset
#   ACK:<next_offset>\n                — chunk received, send from <next_offset>
#   NACK:<expected_offset>\n           — resend from <expected_offset>
#   EOF:<total_size>:<total_crc32>\n   — all frames sent
#   DONE\n                             — transfer complete
#
# Usage: bin_send.sh <input_path> [chunk_size]

INPUT="$1"
CHUNK_SIZE="${2:-512}"

if [ -z "$INPUT" ] || [ ! -f "$INPUT" ]; then
    echo "FAIL:file_not_found"
    exit 1
fi

if command -v xxd >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    _hex_encode() { xxd -p | tr -d '\n'; }
else
    _hex_encode() { hexdump -v -e '/1 "%02x"'; }
fi

if command -v crc32 >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    _crc32() { crc32 /dev/stdin 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $1}'; }
elif command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    _crc32() { python3 -c "import sys,zlib; d=sys.stdin.buffer.read(); print(format(zlib.crc32(d)&0xFFFFFFFF,'08x'))"; }
else
    _crc32() { cat >/dev/null; echo "00000000"; }
fi

FILE_SIZE=$(wc -c < "$INPUT")
TOTAL_CRC=$(cat "$INPUT" | _crc32)

echo "SENDING:${FILE_SIZE}:${TOTAL_CRC}"

OFFSET=0

while [ "$OFFSET" -lt "$FILE_SIZE" ]; do
    # Read chunk at current offset
    CHUNK_HEX=$(dd if="$INPUT" bs=1 skip="$OFFSET" count="$CHUNK_SIZE" 2>/dev/null | _hex_encode)
    if [ -z "$CHUNK_HEX" ]; then
        break
    fi

    CHUNK_BYTES=$(($(echo -n "$CHUNK_HEX" | wc -c) / 2))
    CHUNK_CRC=$(echo -n "$CHUNK_HEX" | xxd -r -p 2>/dev/null | _crc32)
    if [ -z "$CHUNK_CRC" ]; then
        CHUNK_CRC=$(echo -n "$CHUNK_HEX" | sed 's/../\\x&/g' | xargs printf 2>/dev/null | _crc32)
    fi

    # Send frame
    echo "F:${OFFSET}:${CHUNK_HEX}:${CHUNK_CRC}"

    # Check for NACK (non-blocking — read with short timeout)
    # If NACK received, rewind offset
    if IFS= read -t 1 RESP 2>/dev/null; then
        RESP=$(echo "$RESP" | tr -d '\r')
        case "$RESP" in
            NACK:*)
                NACK_OFFSET=$(echo "$RESP" | cut -d: -f2)
                OFFSET="$NACK_OFFSET"
                continue
                ;;
            ACK:*)
                # ACK confirms receiver got up to this offset
                ;;
            C:STOP)
                exit 1
                ;;
        esac
    fi

    OFFSET=$((OFFSET + CHUNK_BYTES))
done

# Send EOF
echo "EOF:${FILE_SIZE}:${TOTAL_CRC}"

# Wait for DONE (with timeout)
WAIT=0
while [ "$WAIT" -lt 10 ]; do
    if IFS= read -t 1 RESP 2>/dev/null; then
        RESP=$(echo "$RESP" | tr -d '\r')
        case "$RESP" in
            DONE*) exit 0 ;;
            C:STOP) exit 1 ;;
        esac
    fi
    WAIT=$((WAIT + 1))
done

exit 0

__HEREDOC_EOF__

done

# Send EOF
echo "EOF:${FILE_SIZE}:${TOTAL_CRC}"

# Wait for DONE (with timeout)
WAIT=0
